text.div: intentionally left empty / not meaningful

tr.td: Acute ST segment elevation myocardial infarction

td.span: Concussion with no loss of consciousness

tr.td: 1 tablet (10 mg) by mouth once daily
60 ACTUAT Fluticasone propionate 0.25 MG/ACTUAT / salmeterol 0.05 MG/ACTUAT Dry Powder Inhaler
Albuterol (as albuterol sulfate) 5 mg/mL solution for inhalation
2.5 mg (0.5 mL of 5 mg/mL solution) via nebulizer every 4 to 6 hours as needed
Amlodipine (as amlodipine besylate) 2.5 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (2.5 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (25 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (81 mg) by mouth once daily
Atorvastatin (as atorvastatin calcium) 40 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (40 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (100 mg) by mouth once daily
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
Streptococcus pneumoniae Danish serotype 1, 3, 4, 5, 6A, 6B, 7F, 8, 9V, 10A, 11A, 12F, 14, 15B, 18C, 19A, 19F, 22F, 23F, 33F capsular polysaccharide antigens conjugated only vaccine product
Streptococcus pneumoniae Danish serotype 1, 3, 4, 5, 6A, 6B, 7F, 9V, 14, 18C, 19A, 19F, 23F, capsular polysaccharide conjugated antigens only vaccine product
Acute ST segment elevation myocardial infarction (disorder)
Assessment of cardiac status using monitoring device
Development of individualized plan of care

ul.li: Achieve and maintain systolic blood pressure below 130 mmHg through lifestyle modifications.
Achieve and maintain diastolic blood pressure below 80 mmHg through lifestyle modifications.
Achieve LDL cholesterol below 70 mg/dL
Achieve total cholesterol below 200 mg/dL
Achieve HDL cholesterol above 50 mg/dL
Achieve triglycerides below 150 mg/dL
Maintain fasting plasma glucose within the recommended range for prediabetes
Maintain HbA1c below the threshold for diabetes diagnosis

tr.td: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease clinical management plan

ul.li: Patient will stop smoking to reduce COPD progression and exacerbations
Maintain oxygen saturation above 88% at rest
Reduce COPD exacerbations to less than 2 per year
Patient will walk at least 100 meters in 6 minutes
Patient will receive annual influenza and recommended pneumococcal vaccinations

tr.td: Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Pain severity - 0-10 verbal numeric rating [Score] - Reported
Blood pressure panel with all children optional
Alkaline phosphatase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Alanine aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Aspartate aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Acute ST segment elevation myocardial infarction
